ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the study started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the study ended */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the study */,
  "study_status" TEXT /* Status of the study (e.g., active, completed, terminated) */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the participant is part of */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the participant */,
  "informed_consent_date" TEXT /* Date informed consent was obtained */,
  "withdrew_from_study" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant withdrew from the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the measurement belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time interval at which the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  "heart_rate" REAL /* Heart rate (beats per minute) */,
  "systolic_bp" REAL /* Systolic blood pressure (mmHg) */,
  "mean_ar_bp" REAL /* Mean arterial pressure (mmHg) */,
  "diastolic_bp" REAL /* Diastolic blood pressure (mmHg) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_diastolic_bp FOREIGN KEY ("diastolic_bp") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_mean_ar_bp FOREIGN KEY ("mean_ar_bp") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_time FOREIGN KEY ("time") REFERENCES time_intervals ("interval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_heart_rate FOREIGN KEY ("heart_rate") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_systolic_bp FOREIGN KEY ("systolic_bp") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "normal_range_min" REAL /* Minimum value for normal range */,
  "normal_range_max" REAL /* Maximum value for normal range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_intervals" (
  "interval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time interval */,
  "interval_name" TEXT /* Name of the time interval */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time interval */,
  "interval_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the time interval (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interval_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., study, measurement) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_metadata_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participant_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participant_metadata_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the version belongs to */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant the version belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes describing the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the collaboration belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration started */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead researcher, contributor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the report belongs to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
